method: 10 executable/checkable prompts (scripts/37 battery), graded by running the code / checking math. Cloud models = raw-model mode (no tools), fair vs local raw generation.
quality_notes: All 4 Claude models nailed median-of-two-sorted (LeetCode Hard) which BOTH local models failed; sibling also missed dice-prime probability. Frontier > local on raw reasoning, as expected.

lite-v1.decode: ~7-8 (= reap25, same arch; OOM'd to measure directly)

takeaway: Frontier Claude (all tiers, incl Haiku) 10/10 > local 8-9/10 on raw quality. Local value = private/offline/free + sibling is 131 tok/s on-device. Different tools: Claude smarter+cloud, local sovereign+fast-on-your-Mac. Codex not runnable from this env.
